title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: Educational video demonstrating Infrastructure as Code for building a serverless REST API on AWS. The tutorial covers AWS CDK with Python, showing both manual AWS console setup and automated CDK deployment of DynamoDB, Lambda, and API Gateway resources.
